speaker: Solen
text: You stand at the edge of the rift. What waits beyond exists in both times at once.

speaker: Mira
text: I can feel it... like a shadow pressing against the air.

speaker: Ren
text: I see it too. On my side. The same thing — older somehow.

speaker: Solen
text: The Warden of Hours. It cannot be wounded by either of you alone. Your blades only bite when your timelines align.

speaker: Solen
text: Stay close to one another across the rift. When your hearts beat as one, the Warden bleeds. When they drift, it heals.

speaker: Ren
text: Then we move together. On three, Mira.
